containers.name: job-worker
containers.script: export MODEL_DIR=/mnt/pai/models/Llama-3.1-8B OUTPUT_ROOT=/mnt/pai/outputs HF_HOME=/mnt/pai/cache/hf TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=/mnt/pai/cache/hf PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 EAS_TASK_MODE=1; tail -f /dev/null

front_end.script: export MODEL_DIR=/mnt/pai/models/Llama-3.1-8B OUTPUT_ROOT=/mnt/pai/outputs HF_HOME=/mnt/pai/cache/hf TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=/mnt/pai/cache/hf PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 EAS_TASK_MODE=1; uvicorn nlp_re_base.pai.service_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
